hero_sub: Official home for Shamrock Ridge HOA — documents, announcements, bylaws, and resources for all 600 households in our neighborhood.
callout1_text: The Shamrock Ridge HOA management certificate is filed with the Texas Department of Licensing and Regulation (TDLR) as required by Texas law. View it on the Documents page.
callout2_text: All exterior modifications — including fences, sheds, additions, paint color changes, and landscaping — require written approval from the Architectural Review Committee before work begins.
callout3_text: All HOA governing documents, including bylaws, CC&Rs, and meeting minutes, are now available for download on the Documents page — no login required.
